TOYOTA MOTOR CORPORATION
Corrosion Protection Requirements

2023 TOYOTA CAMRY

CORROSION PROTECTION AND SEALING

ANTI-CORROSION REQUIREMENTS

All repair operations affecting the body structure must restore the
factory corrosion protection system to original or better condition.

PRIMER APPLICATION:
1. Clean all bare metal surfaces with wax and grease remover
2. Apply zinc phosphate self-etch primer (1-2 mils wet)
3. Apply 2K epoxy primer within 4 hours of metal preparation
4. DO NOT allow bare metal to stand more than 2 hours without primer

SEALER APPLICATION:
Apply urethane sealer (TOYOTA PN 08855-02083 or equivalent) to:
- All factory seam sealer locations per body sealer drawing
- Weld joint overlaps and panel flanges
- All drilled spot weld holes after welding

CAVITY WAX INJECTION:
After assembly and before paint:
- Inject cavity wax into all enclosed rocker cavities
- Inject wax into all door hinge pillar cavities
- Use TOYOTA-approved cavity wax: PN 08862-00060 or 3M 08881

ANTI-CORROSION TREATMENT ZONES:
- Inner rocker panels: anti-corrosion wax + sealer
- Rear lower quarter inner: sealer + cavity wax
- Floor pan seams: anti-corrosion coating both sides
- All weld-through primed flanges: re-prime after welding

GALVANIZED STEEL HANDLING:
The outer quarter panel has galvanized coating. When grinding:
- Wear respiratory protection (zinc fume hazard)
- Restore galvanized protection using cold galvanize spray
- Apply anti-corrosion primer within 1 hour of grinding

RUST PREVENTION:
Apply rust prevention compound (TOYOTA PN 08887-02230) to:
- Rear wheel arch inner face
- All enclosed structural sections
- Any areas showing bare metal after trimming

NOTE: Failure to restore corrosion protection voids the factory
anti-corrosion warranty. See TOYOTA Warranty Policies for details.
